zh.Holderness, Aldbrough, East Riding, York: 英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan le Norreys於1156年出生在英國藍卡爾希頓 羅禮士時，他的父親William le Norreys28歲，母親Mrs. William le Norreys24歲。他於1172年與Mrs. Alan le Norreys在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1189年在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan le Norreys于1156年出生在英国藍卡爾希頓 羅禮士时，他的父亲William le Norreys28岁，母亲Mrs. William le Norreys24岁。他于1172年与Mrs. Alan le Norreys在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1189年在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Norreys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Norris
meanings: habitational name from Middle English norreis, noreis, norais ‘northerner’ (Anglo-Norman French noreis), used both of Norwegians and of inhabitants of northern England and Scotland.
from the Middle English personal name Norreis, derived from norreis ‘northerner’.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Alan le Norreys was born in 1156, in Heaton Norris, Lancashire, England, his father, William le Norreys, was 28 and his mother, Mrs. William le Norreys, was 24. He married Mrs. Alan le Norreys in 1172, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1189, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan le Norreys est né en 1156, à Heaton Norris, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William le Norreys, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William le Norreys, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Alan le Norreys en 1172, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1189, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan le Norreys 1156 in Heaton Norris, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Norreys 28 und seine Mutter Mrs. William le Norreys 24. Er hat 1172 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Alan le Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1189 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Holderness, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan le Norreys è nato il nel 1156 nel Heaton Norris, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William le Norreys, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William le Norreys, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Alan le Norreys nel 1172, nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1189, nel Holderness, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan le Norreysが1156年にイギリスランカシュアイアヒートン ノリスで生まれた時，父William le Norreysは28歳，母Mrs. William le Norreysは24歳であった。1172年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスでMrs. Alan le Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1189年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan le Norreys(이)가 1156년 영국 랭카실르 히턴 노리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Norreys(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William le Norreys(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 Mrs. Alan le Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan le Norreys nasceu em 1156, em Heaton Norris, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William le Norreys, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William le Norreys, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Alan le Norreys em 1172, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1189, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan le Norreys родился в 1156 г. в местности хитон норрис, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William le Norreys было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William le Norreys, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Alan le Norreys в 1172 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1189 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan le Norreys nació en 1156, en Heaton Norris, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William le Norreys, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. William le Norreys, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mrs. Alan le Norreys en 1172, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1189, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años.
